prompt: I bumped MudBlazor from 8.11.0 to 9.3.0 in my Blazor Server project's .csproj. Now my Pages/UserList.razor file at /Users/dejanwho/Projects/Code/mudblazor-skills/mudblazor-migration-8-to-9/evals/fixtures/eval-2-dialog-and-async/UserList.razor doesn't build. The build errors are about IDialogService.Show, ShowMessageBox, IDataGrid.ServerData signature, and the MudMenu activator content. Please update the file to compile and behave correctly against MudBlazor 9.

assertions.text: UserList.razor no longer calls DialogService.Show<...>(...) (the synchronous v8 method)
UserList.razor uses await DialogService.ShowAsync<...>(...) for opening dialogs
UserList.razor uses ShowMessageBoxAsync (not the removed sync ShowMessageBox)
The LoadServerDataAsync method signature now accepts a CancellationToken as the second parameter
The MudMenu's ActivatorContent button wires OnClick to @context.ToggleAsync (or context.OpenAsync) — the v9 explicit activation pattern
UserList.razor preserves all four columns (Id, Name, Email, Actions) from the original
